title: sempervivum × wolfianum
intro: Sempervivum × wolfianum, also known as the hybrid houseleek, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sempervivum × wolfianum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
